_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to apply movement concepts in new or challenging situations and analyse their impact on our performance.

_source.w: We are learning to apply movement concepts in new or challenging situations and analyse their impact on our performance.
y: Deep understanding of movement concepts enables us to perform at our best in any situation.
Analysing the impact of our choices builds metacognitive awareness of our own physicality.
This analytical approach to movement is what drives continuous improvement.
eg: Applying effort concepts to improve power or control in a specific skill.
Analysing how spatial awareness influences our effectiveness in a team game.
Applying time concepts to improve the rhythm and flow of a performance.
Evaluating how our understanding of movement concepts has improved our performance over time.
Discussing how elite athletes apply movement concepts at the highest level.
Creating a presentation that explains how movement concepts improved our performance in a specific activity.
